extraction.one_line_summary: PÖSTLBERGER attacked from the early break in final kilometers, denying sprinters through surprise breakaway survival with 25km positioning.
tactical_patterns: PÖSTLBERGER's break succeeded due to peloton compression incident causing unclipping/slowdown, not pure break strength at 25km mark.
BENEDETTI systematically targeted intermediate KOM points despite being in break, signaling GC ambitions beyond stage hunting.
Break contested multiple intermediate sprints hard suggesting teams underestimated breakaway survival odds on late twisty finale terrain.

rider_signals.PÖSTLBERGER Lukas: positive: timed attack from surviving break when peloton suffered compression/unclipping chaos at 25km, showed tactical awareness
rider_signals.BENEDETTI Cesare: neutral: prioritized KOM jersey collection over stage win cooperation, won three intermediate climbs from break
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: negative: caught behind peloton compression incident that released break, positioning error cost sprint opportunity
